feelings.answer: Sure, for faster sleep, try the 4-7-8 breathing technique, cut caffeine after 2 PM, and keep your room at a comfortable cool temperature. You can also try mindfulness exercises like sitting quietly, focusing on your breath, or body scan to help regulate your nervous system and promote relaxation. For managing anxiety, try deep breathing, grounding techniques, regular exercise, ar enough sleep, and the 5-4-3-2-1 technique with five things you see, four you touch, three you hear, two you smell, and one you taste.
